title: Ore And More (OAM)
body:
Ore And More is a Forge Mod that adds many Ores to the game including Demonite, Rose Quartz, Fire Amber, Ruby...
It also gives some utilities for the Emerald, Copper and Amethyst. 
Discover some new armors, tools, special item (like the End Sword) and find the easter egg ^^ 

I recommand you to go see the original mod page (because i work more on it) :
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/oam-by-choupiclou2007
